name: Pega Platform Low-Code API
what_it_does: Enterprise low-code platform with REST API — providing AI-powered business process management (BPM), customer relationship management (CRM), intelligent automation, case management, and decision management for large enterprises, with Infinity platform combining no-code configuration and full-code extensibility.
use_cases: Triggering Pega case creation and process workflows from external systems via API
Querying case status, work queue data, and SLA metrics for operational dashboards
Integrating Pega decisioning engine (Next Best Action) outputs with external channels
Managing Pega customer data (CDH) for unified customer profile access
Automating Pega workflow routing and assignment from external approval systems
not_for: Simple task management or project tracking (use Asana or Monday.com)
No-code citizen developer apps without IT (use Quickbase or Kintone)
Marketing automation without BPM (use Salesforce Marketing Cloud)
best_when: A large enterprise needs to automate complex, regulated business processes — insurance claims, banking onboarding, telecom service provisioning — with AI-powered decisioning, case management, and deep CRM in an integrated platform.
avoid_when: You're not a large enterprise with complex regulated processes, lack dedicated Pega administrators, or need a simple workflow tool rather than a full enterprise platform.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code and client credentials flows. Bearer token auth. Org-scoped with operator-level permissions. Webhook (Data Flow) for case and work events. On-premises and Pega Cloud deployments. SSO via SAML and OIDC. Pega operator credentials for API access.

pricing.notes: Cambridge, MA-based company. Founded 1983. NASDAQ listed (PEGA). $1.3B+ ARR. Pegasystems is the parent company. Infinity (v8+) is the current platform. AI Next Best Action decisioning engine. Constellation UI framework. Largest enterprises: insurance, banking, telecommunications, healthcare, government. Long-standing enterprise BPM category leader.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API via Pega API Service (DX API). OAuth2 auth. Good enterprise documentation. Pega data model (cases, work objects, pages) requires platform knowledge. Pega on-prem vs Pega Cloud have configuration differences. Next Best Action decisioning via separate Interaction API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Case reads idempotent. Work object reads idempotent. Case creation not idempotent — use business key for idempotent case creation.
known_agent_gotchas: Pega data model (cases, stages, steps, pages) requires platform knowledge
On-premises vs Pega Cloud have different API configurations
Next Best Action Interaction API is separate from core Case API
Pega operator credentials required — service accounts configured in Dev Studio
Enterprise pricing $50K-$2M+/year — integration ROI requires large-scale deployment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, GDPR compliant. Global data residency options. OAuth2 with role-based scopes. Highly regulated industry focus — strongest compliance posture. On-premises deployment for highest security requirements. NASDAQ-listed with public company security standards.
